title: Download Utilities
content:
This module handles downloading files and packages for pip, including support for various URL schemes (HTTP, HTTPS, file, VCS), authentication, and caching.

Key exports and functions:

- `get_file_content`: Retrieves the content of a file from a local path or URL.
- `is_url`: Checks if a string appears to be a URL.
- `url_to_path`: Converts a `file:` URL to a local file path.
- `is_archive_file`: Determines if a filename has a known archive extension.
- `unpack_vcs_link`: Unpacks a version control link into a specified location.
- `is_vcs_url`: Checks if a `Link` object represents a Version Control URL.
- `is_file_url`: Checks if a `Link` object represents a `file:` URL.
- `is_dir_url`: Checks if a `file:` URL points to a directory.

A `PipSession` class is provided for managing requests with custom adapters for caching, insecure hosts, and file URLs.
